# UX Checklist: Compute Green Space Coverage for Environmental Desirability

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage if green space metrics are surfaced to users.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/009-green-space-coverage/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are user-visible outcomes specified for success, no-green-space zero values, fallback data use, and geometry-unresolved omission? [Completeness, Spec §Exception / Error Flows, Spec §Alternate Flows] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for showing green space area, coverage percent, and desirability indicator? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK003 Are units and display formatting for green space area and coverage percent specified? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK004 Are accessibility requirements defined for any UI exposure of green space metrics? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
